completed_tasks.name: Fix rendering — BashTool output not visible on screen
completed_tasks.progress: Root cause identified: layout/rendering issue. BashTool.build() receives correct data but output Padding(Text) child not rendered.

remaining_tasks.name: Fix rendering — BashTool output body invisible
Remove debug logging from app-state.ts and bash-tool.ts

blockers.description: BashTool Column([header, outputPadding]) only renders header — output body invisible despite correct data
blockers.workaround: Likely flitter-core layout constraint issue in StickyHeader or outer Column

decisions.rationale: AMP's invokeBashTool persists to thread items via same mechanism. Shell output should be permanent conversation items.
resolveToolName splits on space, first token must be 'Bash' to route to BashTool renderer

decisions.decision: Force collapsed=false via setItemCollapsed for shell-mode tool calls
decisions.rationale: Config default is defaultToolExpanded=false, but shell-mode output must always be visible

next_action: Debug why BashTool's Column body children (output Padding/Text) are invisible despite build() returning them with correct data. Compare widget tree for shell-mode vs agent-initiated bash tool calls. Check StickyHeader constraints and outer Column layout.
context_notes: The entire data pipeline works: subscribe→next→updateToolCall→BashTool.build(expanded=true, output='hello\n'). Logs confirm BashTool.build receives extractOutput len=6. The Column with [header, Padding(Text(output))] is returned but only header renders on screen. This is a flitter-core rendering/layout issue, not a state issue.
